unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins

A collection of ZSH frameworks, plugins, themes and tutorials.
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Jun 27th

Tutorials

Generic ZSH

  • GHstars0 - Setup ZSH on debian/Ubuntu-based linuxes. Installs Powerlevel10kstars17.4k, zsh-completionsstars4.4k, zsh-autosuggestionsstars17.2k, fast-syntax-highlightingstars1.1k, and more.

    • Jun 25th

    Themes

  • razstars1 - Minimal prompt, includes git status decorations.

    • Jun 24th

    Themes

  • whalesstars0 - Includes decorators for git status, java version, last command return status, and directory.

    • Jun 23rd

    Plugins

  • asdf-direnvstars0 - Integration and completions for asdfstars10.7k and direnvstars174.

    • Themes

  • mini-simplestars0 - Minimalist. Includes vcs status decorations.

    • Jun 20th

    Themes

  • gbtstars476 - Go Bullet Train is a very customizable prompt builder inspired by Bullet Train that runs much faster. Includes many different status cars.

    • Jun 19th

    Themes

  • seriousstars0 - Includes command exit status and git status decorations.

    • Plugins

  • sandboxdstars209 - Speed up your .zshrc & shell startup with lazy-loading by only running setup commands (e.g. eval "$(rbenv init -)", etc) when you need them.
  • fzf-itstars1 - Make any command interactive wrapping it with FZF functionality.
  • ugitstars203 - Lets you undo your last git operation.
  • zawstars498 - ZSH anything.el-like widget.

    • Jun 18th

    Plugins

  • show-pathstars0 - Provides a function shows the $PATH line by line.

    • Jun 17th

    Plugins

  • fzf-utilsstars0 - Provides functions to kill proceses and find in path with fzfstars36.6k.
  • calibre-zaw-sourcestars3 - Calibre - E-book management source for zawstars498

    • Themes

  • lishstars0 - A casual theme. No roughness, just smooth. Includes git, user@host, last command exit status, current directory, current time and root status decorators.

    • Jun 16th

    Plugins

  • emacs (cowboyd)stars0 - Make Emacs the default for CLI operations like editing git commit messages; set up handy aliases.
  • emacs (flinner)stars0 - Uses the Emacs daemon capability, allowing the user to quickly open frames, whether they are opened in a terminal via a ssh connection, or X frames opened on the same host.

    • Jun 15th

    Plugins

  • zsh-not-vimstars0 - Provides a function that automatically shames the user for forgetting they weren't in vim.

    • Jun 14th

    Themes

  • bureau-parrotstars0 - Based on bureau. Includes git decorations.
  • longsilvernstars0 - Includes git and compact pwd decorations.

    • Jun 13th

    Themes

  • kalistars3 - Includes git decorations.
  • ubunlystars4 - Mimics the Kali Linux console. Note - this theme also rebinds a lot of keys and sets a bunch of ZSH options that themes should leave alone.

    • Jun 11th

    Plugins

  • cstars0 - Adds some git shortcuts.
  • posh-git-bashstars316 - Adds git status in your prompt.

    • Jun 9th

    Plugins

  • atuinstars793 - Replaces your existing shell history with a SQLite database, and records additional context for your commands. Additionally, it provides optional and fully encrypted synchronisation of your history between machines, via an Atuin server.
  • cmdtimestars0 - Displays the duration of a command to the terminal forked from the timer plugin.

    • Jun 8th

    Themes

  • gndxstars27 - Includes git status, hostname, directory and last command exit status decorations.

    • Jun 7th

    Themes

  • eleasticstars0 - Inspired by agnosterstars3.1k, optimized for solarized terminal theme, includes git status decorations. Requires powerline-compatible font.
  • xlk-simplestars1 - Simple theme with git decorations.

    • Jun 6th

    Plugins

  • tmstars0 - Simplifies creating new tmux sessions, attaching to existing sessions, switching between sessions, and listing active sessions.
  • tmux-vim-integrationstars3 - Open files in a running vim (or NeoVim) session, from an adjacent tmux pane.
  • tmuxreplstars17 - Simple ZSH plugin to have a R-EP-L tmux session.

    • Jun 5th

    Plugins

  • git-fuzzystars1.8k - A CLI interface to git that relies heavily on fzf.

    • Completions

  • kubectl-fzfstars326 - Fast and powerful fzf-powered autocompletion for kubectl.

    • Jun 4th

    Plugins

  • liferaystars1 - Adds scripts for liferaystars1.7k development.
  • qiime2stars2 - Adds functions and aliases to make working with Quiime 2 easier.

    • Jun 2nd

    Plugins

  • pipxstars3 - Autocompletions for pipxstars3.8k.
  • exa (mohamedelashri)stars0 - Adds aliases for exa, a modern replacement for ls.

    • Jun 1st

    Themes

  • slickstars19 - Inspired by the purestars10.2k, pursstars209 and zsh-efgit-promptstars7. Requires cargo for installation.

    • May 31st

    Themes

  • tursstars0 - Fast, minimal Pursstars209-inspired prompt.
  • pursstars209 - A fast purestars10.2k-inspired prompt written in Rust.
  • starboystars0 - A simple ZSH theme.
  • starshipstars16.6k - Minimal, fast, extremely customizable.
  • bashstars0 - Looks like the default bash prompt.

    • May 29th

    Plugins

  • worktreestars0 - Adds functions that wrap git worktree.
  • reloadstars0 - Adds function to quickly reload your .zshrc.
  • abbr (olets)stars121 - Manages auto-expanding abbreviations that expand inline when you hit space, inspired by fish shell.
  • osx-devstars12 - This plugin adds some commands for maintaining various server programs on a macOS install.

    • Themes

  • chrisandrew.clstars3 - Includes git decorations. Requires powerline-compatible terminal font.

    • May 27th

    Themes

  • unicornstars2 - Inspired by the Wild Cherrystars446 theme. Has emoji git status decorations.

    • Plugins

  • zenostars54 - Fuzzy completion and utility plugin powered by Deno.

    • May 26th

    Completions

  • extract (le0me55i)stars5 - Defines a function called extract that extracts the archive file you pass it, and supports a wide variety of archive filetypes.

    • Themes

  • fizzystars2 - Minimalist prompt, includes git status decorations.

    • May 25th

    Completions

  • fzf-gcloudstars10 - Fuzzy completion to navigate and preview all Google Cloud SDK gcloud CLI commands

    • May 24th

    Plugins

  • aws-vault (blimmer)stars38 - Plugin for aws-vaultstars4.8k. Includes tab completions.
  • simpleserver - Plugin to easily start python SimpleHTTPServer and SimpleHTTPSServer.
  • skimstars0 - Adds support for skimstars2.5k

    • May 23rd

    Themes

  • minimal (5amu)stars1 - Minimal prompt, uses nerdfonts. Includes git and vpn status decorations.

    • May 22nd

    Plugins

  • terraform (thuandt)stars0 - Adds convenience aliases for terraform, along with completions for terraform and terragrunt.

    • Completions

  • aliyunstars0 - Add completions for the Aliyun CLIstars578.

    • May 21st

    Completions

  • bwstars0 - Adds completion for Bitwarden.
  • comoniconstars0 - Tab completions for comoniconstars75.

    • May 20th

    Plugins

  • gitstatusstars0 - Makes it easy to show your git status in your prompt.

    • Themes

  • gitster (zimfw)stars2 - Zim fork of shashankmehta's gitster prompt theme
  • gitsterv2stars0 - Forked from the original gitster theme.

    • May 18th

    Completions

  • fzf-tab-completionstars172 - Add tab completion for ZSH, bash & applications using GNU Readline.
  • dotnetstars0 - Dotnet tab completion.

    • Themes

  • lukerandall-extendedstars1 - Extended version of the lukerandall theme. Includes decorations for git status and the status of the last command run.

    • May 17th

    Themes

  • kidostars4 - Based on ys and robbyrussell themes. Includes decorators for the exit code of the last command run, python virtualenv and VCS status.

    • May 14th

    Plugins

  • arduinostars2 - Adds scripts to build, upload and monitor arduino sketches from a command line. Requires jq.

    • Completions

  • nxstars26 - Completions for nx. Requires jq.

    • May 13th

    Completions

  • fzf-zsh-completionsstars43 - Fuzzy completions for fzfstars36.6k and ZSH that can be triggered by a trigger sequence that defaults to **.

    • May 11th

    Completions

  • insprstars0 - Completions for insprstars36

    • Themes

  • r3nic1estars0 - Agnosterstars3.1k variant with battery status, git/hg status, time, kubernetes context and namespace, non-zero exit code of last command and date decorations. Requires Powerline font.
  • remiiistars7 - Based on Agnosterstars3.1k, optimized for solarizedstars14.8k terminal themes.
  • spowerline - Written in scala, inspired by Agnosterstars3.1k, tmux powerline, vim powerline and the vim status plugin.
  • termuxerstars12 - Theme inspired by Agnosterstars3.1k and linuxer.
  • zysstars8 - Similar to Agnosterstars3.1k, designed to disclose information contextually, with a powerline aesthetic.

    • May 2nd

    Themes

  • delta-promptstars9 - A minimal ZSH prompt.
  • lambda-blazinggitstars0 - Includes blazing fast, detailed git information. Requires Nerd Fonts and the gitstatusstars1.1k plugin.
  • ubuntustars0 - Minimal theme, includes git status decorations.
  • raspberryshstars0 - Includes git, python, time, current host and path decorations.

    • Plugins

  • terminal-workload-reportstars2 - A plugin that calculates and displays how many commands have been run via terminal.
  • update-zshstars1 - Updates custom oh-my-zsh plugins. Only works with the oh-my-zsh framework.

    • Setups

    zgenom

  • zsh-quickstart-kitstars382 - A simple quickstart for using ZSH with zgenomstars48. This includes a curated collection of plugins, automatically configures ZSH to use zgenomstars48 to load them and periodically automatically update itself, the plugins, and the quickstart kit itself.

    • Apr 26th

    Plugins

  • enhancdstars1.9k - A simple tool that provides an enhanced cd command by memorizing all directories visited by a user and use it for the pathname resolution.

    • Completions

  • docker (chr-fritz)stars3 - Loads docker ZSH tab completions directly from Docker for Mac.

    • Apr 25th

    Completions

  • batectstars0 - Adds tab completions for batect build system.

    • Apr 24th

    Themes

  • cleanshstars3 - Minimalist, includes git, Ruby, node and Python version status decorations. Works with standard fonts.

    • Apr 23rd

    Completions

  • helmfilestars0 - Adds autocompletion for helm.
  • tinygostars2 - Add tab completions for tinygo.

    • Themes

  • 14degreestars1 - Includes git, virtualenv and rvm status decorations.

    • Apr 22nd

    Themes

  • michaelpassstars1 - POSIX-friendly cross-platform alanpeabody mod w/ convenient timestamps and full git/ruby support.

    • Apr 18th

    Plugins

  • lando (joshuabedford)stars4 - A collection of alias functions to enable the use of the CLIs within Lando without having to type lando to access them.
  • lando (mannuel)stars0 - Adds aliases for various Lando commands.

    • Apr 16th

    Completions

  • yabaistars5 - Add completions for macOS yabaistars6.8k tiling window manager.

    • Plugins

  • hbtstars1 - Heuristic ZSH suggestion system based on past command usage.

    • Apr 15th

    Completions

  • flowrstars0 - Completion support for git-flowstars25k.

    • Themes

  • eckigstars0 - Minimalist theme with utf-8 icons. Includes git status decorations and a clock.
  • sitstars0 - Minimalist theme with git, command exit status and path decorations.

    • Apr 14th

    Plugins

  • sshukhstars2 - Will update your known_hosts file when you ssh into a server.

    • Apr 8th

    Plugins

  • asdfstars10 - Integration and completions for asdfstars10.7k, the extendable version manager, with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang and more.

    • Apr 7th

    Themes

  • ghotistars0 - Mimics the fish-shell default prompt. Includes git decorations.
  • jpeglegstars0 - Similar to dark blood theme, includes timestamp and git decorations.

    • Apr 2nd

    Themes

  • black-Voidstars246 - Includes account info, root user, using ssh, directory lotation, write permission, vcs info decorations.
  • blackrainstars6 - Another git-aware theme.

    • Apr 1st

    Themes

  • newtstars8 - Fat & fast theme – beautiful inside and out, styled segments done right. Extremely customizable, includes git, username, execution time, directory, background jobs and edit mode decorations.

    • Mar 31st

    Themes

  • vitesse - Inspired by VS Code's Vitessestars69 theme. Includes git status decorations.

    • Mar 29th

    Themes

  • doodleshellstars1 - Minimalist theme, includes git, terraform and aws status decorations.

    • Mar 25th

    Plugins

  • fzf-preztostars1 - Prezto plugin that finds where fzfstars36.6k has been installed and enables its auto-completion and key-bindings.
  • robostars2 - A ZSH plugin for Robo.
  • notify (luismayta)stars5 - Notifications for ZSH with auto installation of dependencies and r2d2 sounds.
  • notify (marzocchi)stars399 - A plugin for ZSH (on macOS and Linux) that posts desktop notifications when a command terminates with a non-zero exit status or when it took more than 30 seconds to complete, if the terminal application is in the background (or the command's terminal tab is inactive).

    • Mar 24th

    Themes

  • handystars1 - Light-weight prompt with git decorations.
  • 000stars0 - Multiline prompt with username, hostname, full path, return status and git decorations.

    • Plugins

  • gentoostars1 - Adds some aliases and functions to work with Gentoo Linux.

    • Mar 19th

    Themes

  • rocketstars0 - Minimalist theme, includes git and hg status decoration.

    • Mar 17th

    Completions

  • codstars307 - A completion demon for bash/fish/ZSH which creates completion functions on the fly when it sees you run something with --help.

    • Mar 16th

    Plugins

  • svn-n-zshstars4 - Rewrite of the stock oh-my-zsh svn plugin.

    • Mar 14th

    Frameworks

    Zinit

  • Turbo mode – 80% faster Zsh startup! for example: instead of 200 ms, it'll be 40 ms,
  • annexes (↔ Zinit extensions),
  • bindkey capturing and remapping,
  • clean fpath (the array $fpath is not being used to add completions and autoload functions, hence it stays concise, not bloated),
  • also, in general: all the mechanisms from the Zsh Plugin Standard – Zinit is a reference implementation of the standard.

    • Plugins

  • bolstars1 - Prints a random quote when you open a terminal window.

    • Mar 12th

    Themes

  • qi3ber2stars0 - A dark multiline theme. Includes git, load average and exit code of last command decorators.
  • simple (savecoders)stars1 - Simple and minimalist theme with git, username and execution status decorations.

    • Mar 11th

    Plugins

  • compestars12 - Add completion for nvim-compestars713.

    • Mar 10th

    Themes

  • shinistars0 - A tiny theme that just shouts out small. Includes directory, username, hostname, time and git decorations.

    • Mar 7th

    Themes

  • quewuistars0 - Simple and clean theme optimized for dark terminal themes. Includes status decorations for the current time, user, directory and git status.

    • Mar 6th

    Plugins

  • emoji-fzfstars2 - Configurable ZSH plugin for the excellent emoji-fzfstars16. It is heavily inspired by emoji-clistars360.

    • Mar 5th

    Plugins

  • fzstars368 - Seamlessly adds fuzzy search to zstars13.1k's tab completion and lets you easily jump around among directories in your history.
  • z.luastars2k - A command line tool which helps you navigate faster by learning your habits. An alternative to z.shstars13.1k with Windows and posix shells support and various improvements. 10x faster than fasd and autojump, 3x faster than z.shstars13.1k.

    • Mar 4th

    Themes

  • gaiastars1 - Originally a fork of Bureaustars22 adds new virtual environments info to the prompt: Kubernetess, virtualenv, rbenv and Java versions. Includes git status integration.
  • linuxerstars2 - Inspired by Yaris Alex Gutierrez's classyTouchstars48, Yad Smood's ys, and the Bureaustars22 theme.

    • Mar 3rd

    Themes

  • ch4rli3stars0 - Lean and simple theme.
  • alarangeirasstars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.

    • Plugins

  • p10k-promptconfigstars0 - adds the ability to easily switch between Powerlevel10k prompt theme config files by defining the P10K_PROMPT variable in your .zshrc file.

    • Mar 2nd

    Plugins

  • alt-and-selectstars0 - Binds the alt-c (copy), alt-v (paste), alt-x (cut) keyboard shortcut to a commands: copy-region-as-kill, yank, kill-region. Remaps the execute command to Alt-Shift-X.

    • Feb 27th

    Plugins

  • up (cjayross)stars2 - A simple way to navigate up through directories.
  • up (peterhurford)stars34 - Adds an up command to cd multiple levels up.
  • zfzfstars3 - A fzf-powered file picker for ZSH which allows you to quickly navigate the directory hierarchy.

    • Feb 26th

    Completions

  • git-flowstars2.7k - ZSH completion support for git-flowstars25k.
  • joestars0 - Adds completions for joestars2.8k gitignore editor.
  • gulp (akoenig)stars33 - Autocompletion for your gulp.js tasks in the Z-Shell (ZSH).
  • gulp (srijanshetty)stars10 - Autocompletion for gulp.
  • grid5000stars2 - Grid 5000 plugin - adds theme, autocompletions.
  • git-annexstars15 - Allows tab completion for most git-annex commands.
  • gcloudstars77 - Add completions for the Google Cloud SDK.
  • nixstars99 - Completions for nix, NixOS, and NixOps.
  • condastars194 - ZSH tab completion for conda.

    • Feb 25th

    Plugins

  • pnpmstars0 - Adds useful aliases for common Pnpm commands.

    • Themes

  • applestars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.

    • Feb 23rd

    Plugins

  • vi-mode (nyquase)stars17 Add extra vi-like functionality.

    • Feb 22nd

    Plugins

  • laravel-sailstars0 - Adds shortcuts for sail commands.
  • zabbstars7 - zabb is a command that tries to figure out the shortest memorable abbreviation of a directory that is usable by zstars2.4k to unambiguously jump to that directory.

    • Completions

  • node-acestars3 - Completions for node ace.

    • Feb 21st

    Completions

  • cpanstars0 - Adds cpan install word<tab> and cpanm install <tab> to complete remote CPAN package names.

    • Plugins

  • last-working-dir-tmuxstars0 - Keeps track of the last used working directory globally and per tmux session and automatically jumps into it for new shells.

    • Feb 20th

    Plugins

  • exa (ptavares)stars0 - Installs and loads exastars13.2k.
  • auto-fortune-cowsaystars0 - Prints out an ASCII picture of a cow saying a random epigram on every zsh start.

    • Feb 18th

    Themes

  • jyumppstars0 - Configuration file and installer for Powerlevel 10K.

    • Feb 17th

    Completions

  • quickjumpstars1 - Adds tab completion support for skimstars2.5k for recent files and directories using fasdstars23.

    • Feb 16th

    Plugins

  • nodenv (c-uo)stars0 - Looks for nodenv in your working directory and loads it when found.

    • Feb 14th

    Tutorials

    Generic ZSH

  • How To Make an Awesome Custom Shell with ZSH - A beginner-friendly tutorial on how to install and configure a ZSH shell.

    • Plugins

  • proxy-pluginstars9 - Quickly enable and disable proxy shell environment settings.
  • proxystars172 - Configure proxy settings for some package managers and software.

    • Feb 13th

    Themes

  • r3versestars0 - Minimalist. Includes git, username and machine hostname status decorations.

    • Feb 12th

    Plugins

  • auto-nvmstars0 - Automatically switches to the node version specified in a given directory.

    • Feb 11th

    Plugins

  • terminal-titlestars3 - Adds a set-term-title function you can use to title terminal windows.

    • Feb 10th

    Themes

  • silverstars257 - A cross-shell customizable powerline-like prompt heavily inspired by Agnosterstars3.1k. A faster rust port of bronzestars44. Requires Nerd Fontsstars27.9k. Very configurable, includes git status decorations.

    • Feb 8th

    Themes

  • vercelstars157 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations.

    • Feb 7th

    Themes

  • agnoster-repopathstars1 - Based on Agnosterstars3.1k and Passionstars43 themes. Includes git and mercurial status, current time and time the last command took decorations in the prompt.

    • Feb 6th

    Themes

  • delta (asavoy)stars0 - Minimal ZSH theme to reduce distractions. Includes an iTerm color settings file.
  • delta (dongri)stars0 - Another minimal theme with embedded git status.

    • Feb 4th

    Themes

  • saturnstars1 - A soft & minimalistic prompt for those who love space and want to have a bit of it on their terminal, featuring cool emojis & highly customizable prompt elements (such as icons, colors, time format, and more).

    • Feb 3rd

    Completions

  • cargostars3 - All the functionality of the original OMZ cargo completion, with additional support for remote crates via cargo search in cargo add.
  • gitlab-runnerstars0 - ZSH completions for gitlab-ci-multi-runner.

    • Frameworks

    znap

  • Multi-repo management
  • Automatic compinit and bashinit - you no longer need them in your .zshrc, znap will do them automatically as needed.

    • Feb 2nd

    Themes

  • bedbugsstars0 - Inspired by Agnoster, this multiline prompt includes git status information, background job count, working directory, user and hostname, Python virtualenv when present, colored return value of last command and root/user sigil.

    • Plugins

  • cmd-statusstars1 - Reports the status of commands including return code and duration.

    • Feb 1st

    Plugins

  • prompt-generatorstars0 - Generates custom themes. Some generated themes require powerline-compatible fonts.

    Themes

  • narrenstars0 - Includes emojii git status decorations, exit status emoji and node version.

  • vcshrstars0 - Help vcsh users require Github repositories using vcsh for auto-installation in ~/.zshrc, etc.

  • aws-vault (reegnz)stars1 - Makes it easier to use aws-vaultstars4.8k in your environment.

  • miramarestars1 - Includes git status decorations. Works best with Deepin Terminal.

  • zcolorsstars11 - Uses your $LS_COLORS to generate a coherent theme for Git and your Zsh prompt, completions and ZSH syntax highlightingstars11.8k.

    Themes

  • classyTouchstars48 - Minimal, clean theme with git support.
  • crème fraîchestars0 - Works best with light terminal backgrounds, includes git and vi-mode status decorations.
  • friendly-fiestastars0 - Fork of terminal-party theme.
  • mochistars4 - Simple theme, designed to resemble rust main function. Includes git and hg status decorations.
  • modestystars0 - A clean and modest zsh theme with condaenv, virtualenv and git status decorations displayed neatly right aligned.
  • neon-potatostars0 - Colorful and minimalist theme. Includes git decorations.
  • robbyrussell-fullpathstars1 - The original robbyrussell with a fullpath in the prompt.
  • simple (pavdmyt)stars2 - Minimalist theme based on robbyrussel that embeds git status information in iTerm's window title bar instead of using space in the prompt.
  • ys-clusterstars1 - ys variant with support for working with batch submission systems for large clusters. Supports Slurm, LSF / IBM Spectrum LSF, and PBS.

  • docker-enter-completionstars10 - Command completion for docker-enterstars2.5k.
  • mooseX-Appstars0 - completion generator for Perl module MooseX::App.

    • Plugins

  • gunstagestars7 - There are at least eight ways to unstage files in a git repository. This is a command-line shell plugin for undoing git add.
  • vi-mode (jeffreytse)stars523 - 💻 A better and friendly vi(vim) mode plugin for ZSH.
  • cdcstars12 - Makes it easier to change directories to directories that are subdirs of a user-defined list of directories. Includes tab-completion, session history and pushd, popd and dirs equivalents.

    Plugins

  • voltastars4 - Seamlessly install and configure the Volta NodeJS toolchain manager.

  • bogostars0 - Inspired by zetastars187. Includes git and ruby version decorations.
  • omusestars1 - Based on Oh-My-ZSH's amuse. Has decorations for git status, time, absolute pwd, RAM usage, time used by last command, and last command exit status.
  • frankstars0 - Frank keeps to the point, displaying information compactly but readably on a single line. Frank keeps to the facts and only tells you extra things when they are important.

  • awsumestars0 - Plugin that enables showing the current awsumestars200 profile.

  • colored-man-pages-modstars8 - Forked from ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/plugins/colored-man-pages. Colorizes man output.
  • npm (igoradamenko)stars4 - Add npm aliases & command completion. Based on the Oh-My-Zsh npm plugin.
  • npm (trystan2k)stars0 - Adds npm aliases. Based on the Oh-My-Zsh npm plugin.
  • favstars2 - ZSH/fzfstars36.6k plugin that makes it really easy to add and recall named favorites of your important directories.

    • Themes

  • aflah-bharistars0 - Modified version of the robbyrussell theme in oh-my-zsh.
  • agitnosterstars4 - Based on agnoster theme included in Oh My Zshstars127.5k and bash-git-promptstars6k. Shows detailed information about git status.
  • alpharizedstars12 - Optimized to work with solarized dark terminals. It's a modified version of the avit theme.
  • araelstars0 - Fork of gallifrey.
  • archiestars1 - Arch Linux inspired ZSH theme. Based on the norm theme.
  • asqstars0 - Based on theunraveler.
  • astro - Based on the ys and robbyrussell themes.
  • avit-d2kstars15 - Based on the oh-my-zsh avit theme, with small changes.
  • avit-modstars0 - Modified version of oh-my-zsh's avit theme.
  • beerstars1 - Inspired by cloud, but with beer icons.
  • biradatestars1 - Based on the bira theme, but displays the date instead of the username in the prompt.
  • biramestars2 - Based on bira.
  • birav2stars0 - Based on bira. Includes git, rvm and virtualenv status decorations.
  • blinks-xfanstars2 - Based on the existing theme blinks.
  • blokkzhstars4 - Theme based on oh-my-zsh's built in gnzh theme. Requires a font with unicode support.
  • bougenvillestars0 - Variant of dallas.
  • bryce-robbyrussellstars0 - Inspired by the powerlinestars2.9k and robbyrussell themes.
  • czshstars2 - ZSH with oh-my-zshstars127.5k and the agnosterstars3.1k theme in a container.
  • diy-ysstars0 - Variant of ys without hostname or time.
  • dustmodstars2 - Derived from the dst theme in oh-my-zsh.
  • emojeerstars0 - Emoji flavored oh-my-zsh theme.
  • fishy-litestars2 - Fork of the original fishy theme in oh-my-zsh with much of the extraneous stuff cut out to improve load speeds. Includes a battery gauge and git status display that can be enabled on the right-hand side of the prompt.
  • fishy2stars2 - ZSH theme inspired by original fishy.
  • frisk-arrowstars0 - A theme based on the frisk oh-my-zsh-theme.
  • frisk-red - Red version of the frisk theme from oh-my-zsh.
  • furiostars17 - Fork of the Cloud oh-my-zsh theme. with different colors and emojis.
  • gideonstars0 - Inspired by avit, includes git decorations, IP address, host and path.
  • gnrnzhstars0 - Customization of gnzh.zsh-theme from oh-my-zsh.
  • hedroed-bureaustars0 - Based on bureau, with added git status decorations and npm status.
  • icestars1 - Very lightly modified bureaustars22 theme combined with bira.
  • intheloop-powerlinestars1 - An extension of the intheloop theme to use powerline fonts.
  • lambda (cdimascio)stars41 - Inspired by the robbyrussell lambda theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • leveragestars0 - Based on minimal, uses colors, and an extra ¬ character, to better distinguish the command line prompt from your output.
  • lilithstars0 - Modification of gallifrey and hyperzshstars472.
  • limpidestars0 - Modified version of miloshadzic theme which displays parent and current directory.
  • lukestars0 - Includes git decorations. Based on the frisk oh-my-zsh theme.
  • modernostars1 - A simple and modern ZSH theme inspired by the robbyrussell theme from Oh-My-ZSH. Includes git status decorations.
  • neewbiestars0 - Minimal theme with git decorations. Based on robbyrussell.
  • phalanxstars0 - Minimal theme in the spirit of the robbyrussell and Pure Shell themes.
  • planetstars0 - A slimmed down version of steef from oh-my-zshstars127.5k.
  • powerlevel9kstars13.1k - Powerlevel9k is a theme for ZSH which uses Powerline Fontsstars21.6k. It can be used with vanilla ZSH or ZSH frameworks such as Oh-My-Zshstars127.5k, Preztostars12.1k, Antigenstars6.5k, and many others.
  • robbyolivierstars1 - Based on ideas from the the robbyrussell theme and the project zsh-git-promptstars1.5k.
  • seppukustars1 - Clean and minimal theme inspired by cloud.
  • short-ysstars0 - Based on the ys theme. Includes git and hg status decorations.
  • small-terminal-diystars0 - A variant of the ys theme in oh-my-zshstars127.5k.
  • steef (zimfw)stars2 - A customizable version of steeef's theme.
  • sunrise-rubystars0 - Similar to sunrise but includes the active Ruby version.
  • superkolostars1 - Add date and return status to the kolo theme.
  • systars2 - Based on ys, includes git status decorations.
  • the-time-lordstars0 - A theme based on gallifrey.
  • wadestars4 - Mashup of the popular ZSH themes Agnoster and Fishy, with some visual tweaks.
  • yairshefistars0 - Minimal theme with line separated prompts. Based on the robbyrussell theme.
  • yz50stars0 - Colorful, based off of robbyrussell and crunch themes. Includes git status decorations.
  • zemm-blinksstars7 - Customized version of oh-my-zsh blinks with mercurial support and other changes.
  • zqtstars2 - Modified version of oh-my-zsh's maran theme.

  • fnmstars0 - Installs and loads the Fast Node Manager (fnm)stars3.9k if it is missing.

  • durationstars0 - Displays command duration if it exceeds a user-settable run time.

    Themes

  • cryostars1 - A standalone clone of the original oh-my-zsh theme with date and time added.

    • Sep 30th, 2020

    Themes

  • gitstatusstars4 - Shows command and git status decorations.

    • Sep 27th, 2020

    Themes

  • purestars10.2k - A pretty, minimal and fast ZSH prompt. Includes git status decorations, prompt turns red if last command failed, username and host decorations when in a remote session or container, and current folder and command when a process is running.

    • Sep 26th, 2020

    Plugins

  • git-lfsstars1 - Adds short aliases for the git-lfs commands.

    • Sep 25th, 2020

    Frameworks

    miniplug

  • No crashes or double plugin loading when re-sourcing .zshrc
  • Unlike other frameworks, Miniplug does not pollute your $PATH
  • Only does the bare minimum for managing plugins

    • Plugins

  • pyenvstars15 - Inspired by zsh-rbenv. Installs, updates or loads pyenv, and adds extra functionality.

    • Sep 23rd, 2020

    Themes

  • alestars3 - Based on the fino theme. Includes git, virtualenv and node status decorations.

    • Sep 22nd, 2020

    Frameworks

    Zinit

  • packages,
  • services ↔ a single-instance, background plugins,

    • Frameworks

    znap

  • Make any prompt appear instantly. Reduce your startup time from ~200ms to ~40ms with just one command.
  • Asynchronously compile your plugins and functions.
  • Cache those expensive eval $(commands).
  • Clone or pull multiple repos in parallel.
  • Re-clone all your repos without you having to re-enter them.

    • Sep 21st, 2020

    Themes

  • s7cstars0 - Works well with dark backgrounds. Includes git status decorations.

    • Sep 20th, 2020

    Plugins

  • azclistars0 - Helper for using the azure cli tools.

    • Sep 19th, 2020

    Themes

  • bureau-envstars0 - Modification of the Oh-My-Zsh Bureau theme that adds a Python virtual environment label to the left of the git block.
  • kgzshstars0 - Includes git status deorations, works well on darker backgrounds.

    • Sep 18th, 2020

    Themes

  • agnoster - Optimized for solarized terminal color schemes, shows git decorations, user@host, working directory, the previous command's exit status and whether you are running with root privileges. Requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • clean (akz92)stars7 - Minimalist ZSH theme.
  • dr4kk0nnys_v2stars0 - Works well on dark backgrounds, includes git status decorations.
  • fdT2Kstars0- Based on agnosterstars3.1k, preset to include virtualenv, last command status, nvm, docker machine and git, hg and bzr status decorations.
  • geometrystars778 - A minimal ZSH theme where any function can be added to the left prompt or (async) right prompt on the fly.
  • iGeekstars0 - Modified iGeek theme. Works with macOS out-of the box, includes git status decorations.
  • jhleeemestars2 - Includes git and python virtualenv status decorations, user, pwd,time and system name.
  • minimal-improvedstars14 - Theme for dark terminals, includes git decorations in the right-side prompt.
  • minimal2stars10 - A minimal and extensible ZSH theme. Forked from subnixr's originalstars219 and adapted for Zimfwstars2k.
  • seti_UXstars1 - A simple omz-compatible theme with a corresponding iTerm 2 color scheme.
  • solarized-powerline (houjunchen)stars10 - Solarized powerline-style theme for ZSH.
  • thetastars9 - Includes git and hg status decorations. Also has java, python, ruby, node, go and elixir version information.

    • Plugins

  • abbr-pathstars6 - Adds functionality of the theme_title_use_abbreviated_path parameter from some oh-my-fish themes.
  • artisanstars111 - Laravel artisan plugin for ZSH to help you to run artisan from anywhere in the project tree, with tab completion!
  • expandstars5 - Expands regular aliases, global aliases, incorrect spellings and phrases, globs, history expansion and $parameters with the spacebar key.
  • firebase (rmrs)stars5 - Add an indicator in the prompt that you're in a directory with a firebase.json file (aka "firebase project").
  • fzf-widgetsstars75 - Adds some ZLE widgets for fzfstars36.6k.
  • gitstars14 - Replacement for the stock oh-my-zsh git plugin. Provides quite a few useful aliases and functions. The motivation to replace the default plugin stems from the fact that it comes with some inconsistencies that make a few popular commands rather unintuitive, so this plugin makes the aliases consistent.
  • goenv (bbenne10)stars5 - Manage $GOPATH similarly to Python's virtualenvwrapper.
  • hubstars9 - ZSH plugin for forking model.
  • jvmstars4 - Allows selection of JDK on macOS.
  • rbenv (jsahlen)stars0 - Variant based on the original oh-my-zsh rbenv plugin.
  • ztracestars13 - Catches output of commands, allows to reuse that output, glue it with history content.
  • zuistars99 - ZSH User Interface library – CGI+DHTML-like rapid TUI application development with ZSH.

    • Sep 16th, 2020

    Plugins

  • fzf (unixorn) - Enables fzfstars36.6k history and file searches.

    • Sep 12th, 2020

    Other Resources

    ZSH Tools

  • ShellSpecstars421 - A full-featured BDD unit testing framework for dash, bash, ksh, ZSH and all POSIX shells.

    • Sep 11th, 2020

    Themes

  • bar (anki-code)stars1 - Minimalist settings for p10kstars17.4k.
  • bar (xp-bar)stars1 - Includes username, host, pwd, git status decorations and 3x hour reminders to drink water.

    • Sep 10th, 2020

    Themes

  • nikitakotstars0 - Small and simple oh-my-zsh theme. Shows current directory and 2 directories behind, git and nodejs status decorations.

    • Sep 7th, 2020

    Frameworks

    Zinit

  • snippets (↔ regular files downloaded via-URL, e.g.: scripts) and through them Oh My Zsh and Prezto plugins support (→ low overhead),
  • reports (from the plugin loads – plugins are no longer black boxes),

    • Plugins

  • dircolors-solarized (joel-porquet)stars92 - Solarized dircolors plugin, with options for dark or light terminal backgrounds.
  • dircolors-solarized (pinelibg)stars2 - Enables Solarized Color Theme for GNU lsstars2.6k.

    • Sep 6th, 2020

    Setups

    zinit

  • ZPWRstars28 - An extremely powerful custom terminal environment built on top of Zinitstars2.2k for maximum speed. A full terminal configuration framework including zsh, tmux, fzf, vim and spacemacs configurations. It includes:

    • Sep 5th, 2020

    Themes

  • simple-gitstars0 - Minimalist theme inspired by gitstatusstars4. Includes git decorations.

    • Sep 4th, 2020

    Themes

  • nunorcstars0 - Minimalist theme, works well on dark backgrounds. Includes git, mercurial and svn satus decorations.

    • Plugins

  • git-acpstars4 - Take the current command line as the commit message and then run git pull, add, commit and push with one keystroke.
  • learnstars1 - Learning collection in MySQL/MariadB to save, query and quiz everything you learn.
  • sed-substars0 - Adds keybindings to do global search and replace on current command line.

    • Completions

  • more-completionsstars15 - 10500 zsh compsys completions!

    • Sep 3rd, 2020

    Themes

  • typewrittenstars469 - Minimal and informative theme that leaves room for what's important. Does asynchronous git decoration updates for speed.
  • dinostars4 - Includes decorations for node, golang, flutter, lua, python & java, also includes git decorations. Requires nerdfonts.

    • Aug 31st, 2020

    Plugins

  • ppsmonstars0 - Reads /sys/class/net/$interface/ to keep track of packet transmission rates. It stores the current rate to a file in the RAM backed filesystem where it can be easily accessed for display in a shell-prompt. Linux-only due to use of /sys.

    • Aug 26th, 2020

    Plugins

  • mvn-contextsstars3 - Allows fast switching between maven configurations.

    • Aug 25th, 2020

    Plugins

  • exa (DarrinTisdale)stars46 - Enables a number of aliases extending exa, the modern replacement for ls.
  • hangulstars48 - Auto correct hangul(한글, korean) to english when it was supposed to be typed english. 영어를 타이핑 해야되는데 한글로 타이핑된경우 자동으로 수정합니다.

    • Aug 22nd, 2020

    Plugins

  • fzf-history-searchstars0 - Replaces Ctrl+R with an fzfstars36.6k-driven history search that includes date/times.

    • Aug 19th, 2020

    Plugins

  • git-flow-avhstars2 - Adds short aliases for the git-flow commands.

    • Aug 18th, 2020

    Themes

  • probestars4 - Includes git status decorations.
  • prompt-powerlinestars49 - A fairly heavyweight ZSH prompt, based on the powerline font from the popular eponymous vim plugin, which works well for a dark background.

    • Aug 17th, 2020

    Plugins

  • doasstars3 - Easily prefix your current or previous commands with doas by pressing esc twice.
  • per-directory-historystars165 - Per directory history for ZSH, as well as global history, and the ability to toggle between them with ^G.
  • search-directory-historystars1 - Allows complex search of per-directory history created using the per-directory-historystars165 plugin.

    • Aug 15th, 2020

    Plugins

  • xxh-plugin-zsh-zshrcstars2 - plugin for xxh-shell-zshstars9 that copies your ~/.zshrc to a remote host and sources it with xxh-shell-zshstars9.

    • Aug 13th, 2020

    Tutorials

    Antigen

  • Frictionless zsh And oh-my-zsh Management With Antigen - Guides you through the setup process and demonstrates how to manage plugins and themes with Antigen to tailor your ZSH experience.

    • Aug 11th, 2020

    Frameworks

  • zdharma/pm-perf-teststars18
  • rossmacarthur/zsh-plugin-manager-benchmarkstars2

    • Aug 8th, 2020

    Completions

  • docker (felixr)stars253 - Add tab completions for docker.
  • docker (greymd)stars30 - Add tab completions for docker and docker-compose.

    • Themes

  • persistars1 - Includes git decorations. Works with both light and dark backgrounds.

    • Aug 7th, 2020

    Plugins

  • hitokotostars5 - Displays a random quote from hitokoto.cn.

    • Aug 3rd, 2020

    Tutorials

    ZSH on Windows

  • superconsolestars30 - Windows-only.

    • ConEmu/zsh out-of-the-box configured to restore previously opened tabs and shell working directories after ConEmu restart
    • Choose between clean and inherited environment when starting new SuperConsole sessions
    • Custom colorful scheme, colorful output for various commands
    • MSYS2 included, zsh and necessary software preinstalled, uses zsh-grml-config
    • Uses Antigen for ZSH theme and config management
    • Enabled number of ZSH plugins to activate completion, highlighting and history for most comfortable use
    • Git-for-Windows repo with proper git and git lfs support for MSYS2 environment is configured, git client already installed.
    • ssh-agent for git works out-of-box, add your keys to ConEmu/msys64/ConEmu/msys64/home/user/.ssh dir
    • Non-blocking ZSH prompt status updates thanks to agkozak-zsh-prompt
    • Customized for MSYS2 command-not-found handler suggests what package to install
    • Sets up nano as main editor, enables nano syntax highlighting
    • Custom helper scripts added to ConEmu/msys64/3rdparty

    • Aug 2nd, 2020

    Themes

  • powerline-shell (b-ryan)stars5.6k - Beautiful and useful prompt generator for Bash, ZSH, Fish, and tcsh. Includes git, svn, fossil and hg decorations, Python virtualenv information, and last command exit status.

    • Jul 26th, 2020

    Tutorials

    Generic ZSH

  • rs-examplestars0 - An example plugin showing how a Rust program can listen to and process commands from ZSH.

    • Jul 25th, 2020

    Themes

  • git-prompt (olivierverdier)stars1.5k - Displays information about the current git repository. In particular the branch name, difference with remote branch, number of files staged or changed, etc.
  • git-prompt (woefe)stars100 - A fast, customizable, pure-shell, asynchronous Git prompt for ZSH heavily inspired by Olivier Verdier's zsh-git-promptstars1.5k and very similar to the "Informative VCS" prompt of fish shell.

    • Jul 24th, 2020

    Plugins

  • z-a-bin-gem-nodestars8 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that exposes binaries without altering $PATH, installs Ruby gems and Node modules and easily exposes their binaries, and updates the gems and modules when the associated plugin or snippet is updated.
  • z-a-manstars14 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that generates man pages for all plugins and snippets.
  • z-a-meta-pluginsstars14 - Install groups of plugins with a single label (Zinitstars2.2k only).
  • z-a-patch-dlstars5 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that downloads files and applies patches through the provided dl'' and patch'' ices.
  • z-a-ruststars17 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that that installs rust and cargo packages inside plugin directories.
  • z-a-submodsstars6 - Zinitstars2.2k extenstion allows installing and managing additional submodules within a plugin or snippet.
  • z-a-teststars3 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that runs tests (via make test, for example) – if it finds any of them – after installing and updating a plugin or snippet.
  • z-a-unscopestars6 - Allows installing plugins for Zinitstars2.2k without specifying the user name by querying the Github API.
  • terraform (macunha1)stars4 - Add convenience aliases for terraform, tab completions and helper function to add your terraform workspace in the prompt.

    • Jul 22nd, 2020

    Plugins

  • easy-motionstars12 - A port of vim-easymotionstars5.8k for ZSH.

    • Jul 17th, 2020

    Plugins

  • tigstars6 - Adds a few advanced bindings and also provides a ZSH-rewritten function and/or script tig-pick.

    • Jul 15th, 2020

    Plugins

  • colorlsstars1 - Defines a few helpful shortcuts to some colorls functions.

    • Jul 14th, 2020

    Plugins

  • command-execution-timerstars2 - Displays the time an interactive shell command takes to execute.

    • Jul 12th, 2020

    Themes

  • minimal (casalinovalerio)stars1 - Minimal prompt, includes git and vpn status decorations.

    • Jul 9th, 2020

  • slugifystars1 - Converts filenames and directories to a web friendly format.

    • Jul 7th, 2020

  • envrcstars0 - Automatically loads and unloads environment variables if a .envrc file is found in a directory.

    Zinit (née zplugin)

    • Jun 27th, 2020

    Themes

  • endless-dogstars3 - oh-my-zsh-compatible theme that mimics grml-zsh-config.
  • gentoostars1 - Breaks out the oh-my-zsh gentoo theme into a separate repo for non-omz users.
  • geometryHostInfostars1 - Adds host info to the geometrystars778 theme.
  • helbstars0 - Loosely based on Gentoo's old bash theme. Includes git information, return value of last command, and uses different username color and prompt char for users ($) and root (#).
  • lagunestars1 - A minimal ZSH theme.
  • mouxstars1 - Works well with a dark terminal background, includes git decorations in RPROMPT.
  • myzshstars0 - Maxime Garcia's myzsh theme.
  • nodestars62 - oh-my-zsh's node theme, broken out to make it easier to use with other plugin managers.
  • nt9stars27 - A clean, distraction free and git focused development theme. Shows path relative to git root (or ~ when outside git repo), time since last commit, current SHA, branch and branch state.
  • nuqlezshstars1 - A simple theme for prezto and oh-my-zsh.
  • powerline (syui)stars0 - A git aware powerline theme.
  • puritystars14 - Inspired by robbyrussell theme and the purestars10.2k prompt.
  • ramielstars0 - Fork of the nodestars62.
  • saraivastars4 - Includes git status decorations, works well on a dark terminal background.
  • schminitz-v2stars0 - Shows git status decorations, user@host information, the exit status of last command, and whether running as root.
  • schminitz - Shows if vim is running in the background when using :sh command.
  • seltzerstars0 - Inspired by the dieter theme, uses color-coding to provide information.
  • senpaistars10 - Clean prompt theme for Devops. Includes git status information, the kubernetes context, AWS profile, GCP project and Azure active cloud.

    • Jun 26th, 2020

    Plugins

  • command-not-foundstars18 - A mirror of the oh-my-zsh command-not-found plugin so you don't have to include all of oh-my-zsh.
  • direnvstars2 - A plugin for installing and loading direnvstars7.4k. Inspired by zsh-pyenvstars15.
  • dwimstars79 - Attempts to predict what you will want to do next. It provides a key binding (control-u) that will replace the current (or previous) command line with the command you will want to run next.
  • fzf-fasdstars43 - Integrates fzfstars36.6k and fasdstars5.4k --- tab completion of z with fzf's fuzzy search!
  • git-complete-urlsstars0 - Enhance git completion to include in the remotes completion (e.g. from git clone) any URL in the clipboard.
  • gvm (dgnest)stars4 - A gvm (Go version manager) plugin for ZSH.
  • history-popupstars0 - Captures the PageUp key and uses dialog to open a popup menu with the history, so the user can interactively navigate through it and pick the history line to bring back to the prompt.
  • history-search-multi-wordstars325 - A syntax highlighted, multi-word history searcher for ZSH, bound to Ctrl-R, with advanced functions (e.g. bump of history entry to top of history).
  • homeassistant-clistars2 - Provides completion and (configuration) helpers for the Home Assistant Command-line interface (hass-cli)stars255. and allows command line interaction with Home Assistant instances.
  • ingstars2 - Streamlined ping output.
  • ipipstars13 - Plugin for IPIP.
  • jdk-switchstars4 - A macOS-only plugin for switching between jdk versions.
  • npmsstars5 - Utility powered by fzf for using npm scripts interactively. Requires fzfstars36.6k and jq.
  • nvm-auto-usestars14 - Calls nvm use automatically whenever you enter a directory that contains an .nvmrc file with a string telling nvm which node to use.
  • oathstars5 - Manages 2FA authentication 6 digit tokens. It was highly inspired by this article about using oathtool for 2 step verification.
  • q (cal2195)stars46 - Add vim-like macro registers to your ZSH shell.
  • razer-status-codestars3 - Change the colour of your Razer Mouse based on the status of the last executed command. Requires OpenRazer linux drivers.
  • tab-titlestars9 - Set the terminal tab title according to current directory or running process. Forked from termsupport.zsh
  • vagrant-box-wrapperstars1 - A wrapper plugin for vagrant that allows for calling vagrant commands from outside of the box directory. The plugin also ships with a few extra commands that help to manage more than one box, along with custom tab-completion.
  • viexchangestars8 - A vi mode plugin for easily swapping text between two places in the buffer, like vim-exchange.
  • zinit-consolestars20 – A semigraphical (curses) consolette for zinit plugin manager.

    • Jun 24th, 2020

    Frameworks

    Zinit

  • plugin unloading (allows e.g.: dynamic theme switching),

    • Tutorials

    Zinit (née zplugin)

  • zinit-configsstars144 - Real-world configuration files (basically a collection of .zshrc files) holding Zinit invocations.

    • Plugins

  • command-timestars122 - Show execution time for long commands in ZSH and powerlevel9kstars13.1k. Similar to REPORTTIME builtin, but only outputs when user + system time >= REPORTTIME.
  • nodenv (jsahlen)stars4 - Auto-load nodenv and its completions into the shell.
  • toggle-command-prefixstars11 - Add a widget to toggle a prefix to a command. Binds Alt+s to prefix a command with sudo by default.
  • vi-incrementstars4 - Add vim-like increment/decrement operations.
  • vi-motionsstars17 - Add new motions and text objects including quoted/bracketed text and commands.
  • vi-quotestars2 - Add an operation which quotes or unquotes a motion.

    • Feb 5th, 2020

    Themes

  • zeldastars2 Zelda-inspired theme. Includes git status decorations.

    • Feb 3rd, 2020

    Completions

  • test-kitchen-zsh-pluginstars6 - Add completions for Test Kitchenstars1.8k).

    • Plugins

  • jqstars43 jq-repl with line editor functionality.

    • Themes

  • halfeldstars2 - Minimalist theme with git decorations.

    • Feb 2nd, 2020

    Themes

  • halilstars0 - Fork of oh-my-zsh's amuse theme.

    • Jan 29th, 2020

    Themes

  • slimlinestars46 - Minimal, fast and elegant ZSH prompt. Displays the right information at the right time.
  • kissstars21 - Simple theme for oh-my-zsh, VSCode, iTerm2, Neovim, and RStudio. Includes git status decorations.

    • Jan 23rd, 2020

    Plugins

  • aws2stars2 - Provides completion support for version 2 of the awscli and a few utilities to manage AWS profiles and display them in the prompt.

    zshing

  • Install ZSH plugins
  • Update ZSH plugins
  • Search by name all available ZSH Plugins

  • startifystars15 - vim-startify -like plugin for ZSH.

  • ez-pzstars0 - Minimalist theme with git status decorations, inspired by bureaustars22.

    • Jan 17th, 2020

    Themes

  • agnoster-jstars15 - Optimized for solarized color scheme, git or other VCS tools, and unicode-compatible fonts. Includes status of last command run, user@hostname, git status decorations, working directory, whether running as root, whether background jobs are running, and other information.

    • Jan 16th, 2020

  • mbolisstars0 - Includes git decorations, changes prompt color if root user, active jobs, and jenvstars3.7k integration.

  • planktonstars1 - Simple, no-frills theme.

    • Jan 12th, 2020

  • t2erstars0 - Minimalist theme with git decorations.

  • node-env-installerstars2 - Uses nvm to install new versions and modules for the current project.

  • apollostars60 - A heavily customizable, compatible and performant ZSH theme that uses modules to enable features.

    • Jan 8th, 2020

    Themes

  • gitster (shashankmehta) - When in a git repo, it shows the location from the git repository root folder. When not in a git repo, it shows the path relative to home, ~.

  • cf-zsh-autocompletestars33 - Adds autocomplete for all Cloud Foundry CLI commands.

  • youtube-dl-aliasesstars0 - Adds yt aliases to download videos from YouTube.

  • printcstars10 - Allows you to print in any color in the RGB space via a simple printc call.

  • systemdstars4 - Adds many aliases for systemd.

  • symphony (TheGrowingPlant)stars2 - Autocompletion for Symfony 3 and 4 commands.

  • nix-shellstars139 - Plugin that lets you use ZSH as the default shell in a nix-shell environment.

  • extract (thetic)stars6 - Fork of the oh-my-zsh extract plugin.

  • goenv (CDA0) - Plugin for installing, updating and loading goenv.

  • zredisstars14 - Adds Redis database support, with database_key <-> shell_variable binding. Supports all data types.

  • penteststars5 - Aliases and functions for the lazy penetration tester.

    Themes

  • magicmacestars2 - Inspired by xero's zsh prompt and eriner's promptstars7. Includes status codes for active python venv, exit status of last command, shortened working directory, git status decorations.
  • s1ck94stars1 - Fork of the (first deprecated, now extinct) minimal prompt by S1cK94. Shows whether user is root, background job status, vi-mode, exit status of last command, and git status decorations.
  • collonstars2 - Lightweight theme with git status decorations, cwd, time, host, exit status of last command. Does not require special fonts.

    • Nov 13th, 2019

    Plugins

  • boss-gitstars4 - Adds some convenience aliases for git.

    • Nov 11th, 2019

    Themes

  • dthemestars2 - Optimized for people using a solarized terminal color scheme and git. Works best with a unicode font.

    • Nov 9th, 2019

  • gimmestars0 - A simplistic theme for ZSH with git integration. Inspired by the gitsomestars56 theme.

    • Nov 7th, 2019

  • evil-registersstars20 - Extends ZLE vi commands to remotely access named registers of the vim and nvim editors, and system selection and clipboard.

  • bananastars3 - Includes git status decorations and current directory.

    • Nov 5th, 2019

    Themes

  • matterstars1 - Shows git status, AWS vault role, background jobs, exit code of last command & hostname.
  • asyncstars3 - Shows current directory, git state, return value of last command if it had an error code, number of background jobs, execution time of long-running commands, current python virtualenv.

    • Nov 4th, 2019

    Plugins

  • laravel-austars7 - Adds aliases for Laravel 6.
  • saml2aws-autostars4 - When using multiple AWS profiles, e.g. different accounts for your stages (development, pre-prod, prod), can be used to determine which profile is currently exported and if the token is still valid.

    • Nov 1st, 2019

    Frameworks

    zpm

  • Fastest plugin manager (Really, after the first run, zpm will not be used at all)
  • Support for async loading
  • Dependencies between packages
  • zpm runs on Linux, macOS, FreeBSD and Android.

    • Tutorials

  • ZSH Gem 24 - Part of the 2011 ZSH Advent Calendar. Covers oh-my-zsh and zshuery.

  • hana-matchastars0 - A simple theme with the first character being 花(hana), the kanji for flower. This theme was inspired by a keycap set called DSA Hana. This pairs well with the hana atomstars0 theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • phi φstars10 - A clean and simple theme for ZSH inspired and forked from the Lambda (Mod) ZSHstars432 theme.

    • Plugins

  • allergenstars2 - A collection of custom ZSH plugins to use with Antigen.
  • atom-pluginstars4 - Based on the Sublimestars3 plugin, lets you launch a file or folder in Atom from iTerm 2.
  • bepoptimiststars1 - Remap ZSH vi-mode for French bépo keyboard.
  • blackboxstars5.8k - Stack Exchange's toolkit for storing keys/credentials securely in a git repository.
  • careful_rmstars19 - A wrapper for rm that adds trash/recycling and useful warnings.
  • fancy-ctrl-zstars8 - Broken out version of the version in oh-my-zsh so users of other frameworks don't have to import all of oh-my-zsh.
  • geometry-npm-package-versionstars1 - Geometrystars778 plugin to display the current folder's npm package version.
  • ghost-zeusstars3 - Lets you use zeusstars3.3k with normal rails commands.
  • gpg-cryptstars6 - ZSH plugin to encrypt and decrypt files or directories in place.
  • jira-plusstars7 - Create JIRA tickets from the command line.
  • kstars1.5k - Directory listings for ZSH with git status decorations.
  • kube-ps1stars2.2k - ZSH plugin for kubectl that adds current context and namespace.
  • kubernetesstars41 - Add kubernetes helper functions and aliases.
  • locate-sublime-projects-clistars0 - Allows searching for Sublime Text projects and opens them in Sublime.
  • loremipsumstars0 - Generate lorem ipsum text on the command line. Gets its data from lipsum.com.
  • mac-packagingstars1 - A set of common functions used for enterprise Mac packaging with Munki.
  • msf - Metasploit handler plugin for starting handlers easily.
  • pewstars1 - Sets up and manages Python virtualenvs using pewstars1.1k, automatically switches virtualenvs as you move directories.
  • pip-appstars34 - Makes it easy to install python applications into distinct Python virtualenvs so they don't conflict with any other python requirements on your system.
  • solarized-manstars23 - A modified version of oh-my-zsh's plugin colored-man-pages, optimized for the solarized dark theme in the terminal.
  • uvenvstars1 - Extends the functionality of the original oh-my-zsh venv module.
  • youtube-dlstars0 - Simple plugin for youtube-dl.

  • quotifystars2 - Displays inspiring coding quotes from our pairs when starting up.

    Plugins

  • kubecolorstars6 - Simplify and colorize the output of kubectl get events -w

    • Jun 23rd, 2019

    Themes

  • jakestars0 - Shows the time, the current directory, and git branch information including the branch name and a red + if the branch has un-pushed changes.
  • mexassistars1 - Checks the /sys/class/power_supply folders to determine if the system is installed on a laptop or desktop machine. Reads the battery percentage grepping acpi command and displays it in the prompt. Includes git decorations.

    • Jun 22nd, 2019

    Plugins

  • igitstars6 - Interactive git commands using fzfstars36.6k.
  • autoupdate-oh-my-zsh-pluginsstars83 - oh-my-zsh doesn't automatically update non-core plugins, this adds plugin autoupdating to oh-my-zsh.

    • Jun 20th, 2019

    Plugins

  • antigen-git-rebasestars6 - Antigen/ZSH script to aid with git rebasing.
  • cd-reporootstars1 - A ZSH plugin to cd to the current repository checkout's root directory.
  • dropboxstars20 - A dropbox plugin for ZSH that provides dropbox-cli and dropbox-uploader commands.
  • fast-alias-tipsstars46 - Helps remember the aliases you defined and forgot about. Ported from djui/alias-tipsstars485.
  • geeknotestars14 - Geeknote plugin for ZSH.
  • git-aliases (mdumitru)stars14 - Broken out version of the version in oh-my-zsh so users of other frameworks don't have to import all of oh-my-zsh.
  • history-substring-searchstars1.6k - Needs to be loaded after zsh-syntax-highlighting, or they'll both break. You'll also need to bind keys to its functions, details are in the README.md.
  • lesaint-mvnstars0 - Maven plugins for oh-my-zsh.
  • markeditstars4 - Mark files and edit them with autocompletion for existing marks.
  • mode-switch.CLIstars2 - A ZSH plugin for switching command line between normal mode and vi mode.
  • pgstars17 - Adds utility functions to work with PostgreSQL.
  • sys-diverstars6 - A ZSH plugin for directory change or editor startup with only key operations using widgets without typing commands.
  • undollarstars7 - Strips the dollar sign from the beginning of the terminal prompt.
  • vim-modestars185 - Friendly vi-mode bindings, adding basic Emacs keys, incremental search, mode indicators and more.
  • vimmanstars17 - View vim plugin manuals (help) like man in ZSH.
  • vimtostars28 - Improved ZSH vi mode (bindkey -v) plugin.
  • virtualenv-promptstars37 - A fork of the virtualenv plugin from upstream. Adds support for customizing the virtualenv prompt in oh-my-zsh themes.
  • ansiblestars10 - A plugin for Ansible.
  • accurevstars1 - ZSH plugin for accurev.
  • abbrev-aliasstars87 - Provides functionality similar to vim's abbreviation expansion.
  • almostontopstars74 - Clears previous command output every time before new command executed in shell. Inspired by the alwaysontopstars173 plugin for bash.

    • Themes

  • eucalyptusstars1 - Simple one-line theme for minimalist vi-mode users inspired by agnosterstars3.1k and powerlevel9kstars13.1k. Includes git status indicator, vi-mode indicator, current directory and current path.

    • Jun 19th, 2019

    Themes

  • matrixstars7 - Variant of powerlevel9kstars13.1k styled to look like something in the Matrix movie trilogy. Includes git status decorations.

    • Jun 16th, 2019

    Plugins

  • git-smart-commandsstars9 - Adds extra git commands to make some common git usages more efficient.
  • git-it-onstars85 - Adds ability to open a folder in your current branch on GitHub.
  • gcloud-projectstars7 - Easy selection of Google Cloud Projects.
  • forgitstars1.5k - Utility tool for git which takes advantage of fuzzy finder fzfstars36.6k.
  • fast-syntax-highlightingstars1.1k - Optimized and improved zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting – better response times, switchable highlight themes.

    • Jun 9th, 2019

    Themes

  • spaceshipstars14.4k - Theme with git, nvm, rvm/rbenv/chruby, python, ssh and other useful status indicators.

    • Jun 7th, 2019

    Themes

  • illuvia-gitsterstars1 - Fork of ergenekonyigit/lambda-gitsterstars75 with spacing improvements and an updated icon. Includes git status information.
  • angry flystars3 - Shows git information in the right hand prompt.

    • Jun 6th, 2019

    Themes

  • agnoster-plusstars3 - Agnoster variant optimized for use with Solarized Dark terminal color scheme. Includes git status.
  • agnosterAfrostars7 - Based on Powerlinestars2.9k and Agnoster themes and inspired by the agnosterzakstars333.
  • agnosterzakstars333 - Based on Agnoster, shows battery life, date & time, git status, current directory and user & host information.
  • alien-minimalstars123 - Minimalist ZSH theme with git status displayed.
  • aftermathstars1 - Get a nice summary line after each command you run in your shell.
  • agkozakstars183 - Uses three asynchronous methods to keep the ZSH prompt responsive while displaying the git status and indicators of SSH connection, exit codes, and vi mode, along with an abbreviated, PROMPT_DIRTRIM-style path. Very customizable. Asynchronous even on Cygwin and MSYS2.
  • agnoster-fcamblorstars228 - Solarized Agnoster variant with git status information. Requires a unicode font and works best with a solarizedstars14.8k terminal.

    • Jun 5th, 2019

    Themes

  • blissstars15 - A delicate theme that injects color without overwhelming your workspace. Designed to be used with the bliss iTermstars9 color scheme and bliss dircolorsstars18. Includes git status decorations.

    • May 31st, 2019

    Plugins

  • php-version-rcfile-switcherstars4 - Automatically switch between php versions using php-versionstars638 if an rc-file is present in a directory.

    • May 30th, 2019

    Themes

  • gimbostars2 - A variant of purepower with more features, a little eye candy and context-sensitive extra lines. Includes git status decorations, history number, username/hostname context, directory status, status of last command if it failed, and the Python virtualenv name if present.

    • May 27th, 2019

    Themes

  • phantomkstars2 - Colorful theme, includes go version, node version and git status.

    sheldon

  • Highly configurable install methods using handlebars templating.

  • terragruntstars3 - Plugin for Terragruntstars5k, a thin wrapper for Terraform that provides extra tools.

    Plugins

  • pr-gitstars1 - Creates a global variable with git status information that can be displayed in prompts.

  • luxstars14 - ZSH plugin to toggle the light & dark modes of macOS and other items and applications via the lux command. Includes macos_is_dark helper function to determine if the macOS dark mode is active for use in theming.

  • Nerd Fontsstars27.9k - Collection of over 20 patched fonts (over 2,000 variations) & FontForge font patcher python script for Powerline, Font Awesome, Octicons, Devicons, and Vim Devicons. Includes: Droid Sans, Meslo, Source Code, AnonymousPro, Hack, ProFont, Inconsolata, and many more.

    Frameworks

    sheldon

  • Can manage
    • Any git repository.
      • Branch/tag/commit support.
      • Extra support for GitHub repositories.
      • Extra support for Gists.
    • Arbitrary remote files, simply specify the URL.
    • Local plugins, simply specify the directory path.
  • Uses a lock file for much faster loading of plugins.

  • sobolestars96 - A minimalistic ZSH theme inspired by the old-fashioned hobbies. No verbose gimmicks, no emoji, no fidget spinners, and no other visual noise. Has both light and dark modes.

    • Nov 11th, 2018

    Plugins

  • zgen-compinit-tweakstars3 - Make compinit run only once after all loading is done by zgenstars1.3k.
  • 256colorstars107 - Enhances the terminal environment with 256 colors. It looks at the chosen TERM environment variable and sees if there is respective ncurses' terminfo with 256 colors available. The result is a multicolor terminal, if available.
  • autoenv-extendedstars135 - Extended version of the zsh-autoenvstars525 plugin.
  • autoenvstars525 - If a directory contains a .env file, it will automatically be executed when you cd into it.
  • autojumpstars12.6k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line. Install autojump-zsh for best results.
  • autoupdate-antigenstars23 - Antigen doesn't do automatic updates like oh-my-zsh. This plugin adds auto updating for antigen, both of antigen and the bundles loaded in your configuration.
  • aws-uploadstars0 - Boost your productivity with aws-upload.
  • branch-managerstars11 - A plugin for managing git branches.
  • cd-gitrootstars55 - A ZSH plugin to cd to the git repository root directory.
  • cd-reminderstars9 - Display reminders when cd-ing into specified directories.
  • colored-man-pagesstars31 - Colorize man pages.
  • flow-pluginstars44 - This plugin makes the flow command available inside every subdirectory of the TYPO3 Flow distribution.
  • fzf-marksstars351 - Little script to create, navigate and delete bookmarks in bash and zsh, using the fuzzy finder fzfstars36.6k.
  • git-add-remotestars14 - Easily add the upstream remote to your git fork.
  • git-aliases.zshstars57 - Creates a lot of useful aliases for combinations of commonly used git commands.
  • git-extra-commandsstars644 - Extra git helper scripts packaged as a plugin.
  • git-pluginstars3 - Adds some functions for git.
  • git-prompt-useremailstars4 - Adds prompt reminders for git user.email.
  • git-secretstars2.4k - A bash-tool to store your private data inside a git repository.
  • git-syncstars41 - A ZSH plugin to sync git repositories and clean them up.
  • grep2awkstars20 - ZLE widget to transform grep command into awk command.
  • grunt-pluginstars7 - Add autocompletion for grunt.
  • gvm (yerinle)stars1 - Provides autocompletion for gvm (Groovy enVironment Manager).
  • history-syncstars143 - An Oh My Zsh plugin for GPG encrypted, Internet synchronized ZSH history using git.
  • hub-ci-zsh-pluginstars0 - A simple plugin for adding hub ci-status to your ZSH theme.
  • kill-nodestars6 - ZSH plugin for murdering node process families.
  • lesaint-gitstars0 - Replacement git plugin for Oh-My-Zsh-compatible frameworks.
  • nodestars6 - Srijan Shetty's nodejs plugin for ZSH with caching of nvm completions and autoloading of nvm if present.
  • nvmstars1.5k - ZSH plugin for installing, updating and loading nvm.
  • opera-git-pluginstars0 - git aliases.
  • pyenv-lazy-loadstars3 - Plugin for lazy-loading pyenv in ZSH.
  • pyenv-lazystars26 - Lazy load pyenv. The initial eval "$(pyenv init -)" is executed the first time pyenv is called.
  • schrootstars0 - Show current chroot name in your prompt.
  • sensei-gitstars3 - Adds many git aliases and helper shell functions.
  • sudostars16 - The sudo plugin from oh-my-zsh, extracted to a standalone. Toggles sudo before the current/previous command by pressing ESC-ESC in emacs-mode or vi-command mode.
  • tipzstars24 - Displays your alias if you have an alias for the command you just ran, similarly to alias-tipsstars485.
  • tmux-zsh-vim-titlesstars20 - Create unified terminal titles for tmux, ZSH, and Vim/NVIM, modular.
  • zconveystars51 - Adds ability to send commands to other ZSH sessions, you can use this to cd $PWD on all active Z shell sessions, for example.
  • zedstars6 - A simple wrapper for zstars13.1k to install it via a ZSH plugin.
  • appupstars9 - Adds start, stop, up and down commands when it detects a docker-compose.yml or Vagrantfile in the current directory (e.g. your application). Just run up and get coding!

    • Fonts

  • Fantasque-sansstars5.5k - Another Powerline-compatible font.

    • Themes

  • cobalt2gitstars1 - Cobalt 2 theme with git extensions.
  • hanpenstars0 - Shows git branch and status, last command exit code, last command execution time if more than ZSH_THEME_HANPEN_CMD_MAX_EXEC_TIME.
  • kinda-fishystars5 - Based on Fishy theme, but shows full paths instead of abbreviated directories and only shows user@machine in ssh sessions and docker containers.
  • multilinestars16 - Powerline-esque theme based on agnosterstars3.1k.
  • nknustars0 - A simple oh-my-zsh theme.
  • predawn-shellstars48 - Theme optimized for dark terminal themes.
  • random-emoji-robbyrussellstars1 - Based on random-emoji and robbyrussell themes.
