  • prompt_j2stars0 - Has a dynamic exit status indicator, can change to two lines dynamically to display context.

    • Oct 29th, 2018

    Themes

  • powerline (brucehsu)stars8 - A two-line version of powerline: one for information, one for input.

    • Plugins

  • jenv-lazystars4 - A ZSH plugin for lazy loading of jEnv.

    • Oct 28th, 2018

    Themes

  • powerline-hsstars118 - A Powerlinestars12.5k clone written in Haskell. It is significantly faster than the original implementation, and makes the shell noticeably more responsive.

    • Oct 26th, 2018

    Themes

  • rbstars2 - Powerline-styled ZSH theme based on Agnoster, optimized for git and solarized terminals. Requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • funkyberlinstars1 - A colorful two-line theme with support for git and svn.

    • Oct 24th, 2018

    Themes

  • jamstars3 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git status and rvm status.

    • Oct 23rd, 2018

    Themes

  • kevinstars1 - Colorful theme, includes iTerm 2 color schemes.

    • Oct 22nd, 2018

    Plugins

  • zeitstars157 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git status information.

    • Oct 21st, 2018

    Themes

  • jcstars1 - For dark terminal backgrounds, includes git status information.

    • Oct 15th, 2018

    Plugins

  • q (tomsquest)stars0 - Tail/remove the temp file for Qstars1.2k, the Dirty Debugging Tool.

    • Oct 14th, 2018

    Plugins

  • voxstars8 - An oh-my-zsh plugin to control VOX, a lightweight full-featured audio player for macOS that can play a variety of formats including FLAC and Ogg Vorbis.
  • crystalstars28 - A plugin for Crystalstars16.4k.
  • fixnumpad-osx - Enables numpad keys of Apple keyboards to be recognized in ZSH.
  • jhipsterstars33 - Adds commands for jHipster.
  • macosstars2 - A ZSH plugin for macOS.
  • mylocationstars6 - A plugin to show your current location based on your IP address.
  • plugin-ibtoolstars1 - Adds ibtool shortcuts to generate localized XIB files.
  • pluginstars9 - Creates custom oh-my-zsh plugins from a boilerplate template. Very oh-my-zsh centric, the generated plugins will need editing to work with other frameworks.
  • terminal-appstars13 - A plugin for integrating with the new El Capitan Terminal.app features.
  • velocitystars2 - Powerline-based theme elements for ZSH and tmux.
  • venv-litestars4 - A super-lightweight sort-of-clone of virtualenvwrapper; it pretty much expects you to be using pyenvstars23.3k (though you don't have to), and because it's based on the venv module, (creation) only works for python >= 3.3.

    • Tutorials

    Generic ZSH

  • A Beautifully Productive Terminal Experience - Tutorial using a combination of iTerm 2, ZSH, Preztostars12.1k, Tmux, and Tmuxinatorstars10.7k to make for an extremely productive developer workflow.

    • Tutorials

    Antigen

  • Oh-my-zsh is the Disease and Antigen is the Vaccine - Josh Davis' introduction to Antigen.

    • Tutorials

    Prezto

  • A Beautifully Productive Terminal Experience - Mike Buss' blog post about using Prezto, Tmux & Tmuxinator.

    • Completions

  • dropboxstars20 - A dropbox plugin for Zsh that provides dropbox-cli and dropbox-uploader commands.
  • surfstars2 - Add completions for surf.
  • tugboatstars4 - Adds autocompletion for tugboatstars1.5k command.

    • Themes

  • aplosstars3 - Minimal ZSH prompt with working directory, git local info, git remote info, time and exit code.
  • bgnosterstars0 - Agnoster variant with unicode symbols baked in.
  • bluehighstars2 - Minimal theme, displays git information.
  • bullet-trainstars2.6k - Inspired by the Powerline Vim plugin. It aims for simplicity, showing information only when it's relevant.
  • candy-lightstars1 - Light version of the candy theme.
  • chistars6 - A ZSH theme optimized for iTerm 2 users on macOS.
  • claritystars6 - Designed for for simpleness and extensibility.
  • eubwstars0 - A simple theme with git information.
  • feder - Clean, simple, compatible and meaningful. Tested on Linux, Unix and Windows under ANSI colors.
  • josestars4 - Inspired by beer-themestars1, includes git status.
  • materialshellstars755 - A material design theme for your shell with a good contrast and color pops at the important parts. Designed to be easy on the eyes.
  • mixedstars0 - Optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • multi-shell-repo-promptstars11 - Provides useful information (in your prompt) about the repository that you are in. It currently works for Git and Mercurial, under ZSH as well as bash.
  • powerline-cutestars28 - Based on bullet-trainstars2.6k.
  • powerline-shell (banga)stars5.6k - A powerlinestars2.9k-like prompt for Bash, ZSH and Fish. Shows important details about git/svn/hg/fossil branch and is easy to customize/extend.
  • punctualstars42 - Easily customizable, influenced by spaceshipstars14.4k.
  • zsh2000stars68 - Powerline looking ZSH theme which includes the rvm prompt, git status and branch, current time, user, hostname, pwd, exit status, whether running as root and background job status.

    • Fonts

  • Hack - Another Powerline-compatible font designed specifically for source code.
  • Monoid - Monoid is customizable and optimized for coding with bitmap-like sharpness at 15px line-height even on low res displays.

    • Other Resources

    ZSH Tools

  • zunitstars140 - A powerful unit testing framework for ZSH

    • Oct 13th, 2018

    Themes

  • rummikstars0 - @rummik's theme. Supports psmin, and git status information in the prompt.

    • Oct 12th, 2018

    Themes

  • shrugstars4 - Simple theme which displays current directory and git information.

    • Oct 11th, 2018

    Themes

  • colorbirastars0 - Allows per-host prompt coloring, displays rvm, virtualenv and git information.
  • hfulldatestars1 - Displays time, date, OS (including distro if on Linux), directory and whether running as root.
  • powerlevelHipstersmoothiestars7 - Add-on for powerlevel9kstars13.1k.
  • powerline (jeremy)stars1.1k - Another take on a powerline theme. Nicely configurable, but requires at least a 256 color-capable terminal with a powerline-compatible terminal font.
  • random-emoji - Random emoji.

    • Oct 9th, 2018

    Themes

  • comxtohrstars3 - Brightly colored theme optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • draculastars142 - A dark theme for Atom, Alfred, Chrome DevTools, iTerm 2, Sublime Text, Textmate, Terminal.app, Vim, Xcode, and ZSH.
  • dragonstars10 - Minimalistic, includes git status information.
  • eggshaustedstars1 - A git-aware theme for people who are tired of getting errors.
  • fortuitystars2 - Includes status of last command, git information and current directory.
  • gawainestars3 - Nicola Racco's theme. Requires rvm & git plugins.
  • girazzstars0 - A modification to the gnzh theme which adds vi mode to the right prompt.
  • gitsomestars56 - Super simple prompt with git info, optimized for the Flat Terminalstars617 color scheme.
  • glimmerstars1 - Includes git branch, time and user@host.
  • hackersaurusstars10 - A theme with git status and exit code of last command run embedded in the prompt. Related to powerlevel9kstars13.1k.
  • haribostars7 - Simple git status + timestamp in prompt.
  • hedgehog - Simple, no-nonsense and clean, with support for git and return codes.
  • iggystars12 - A super happy awesome Powerline-style, git-aware prezto only theme.
  • igorsilvastars9 - Shows current directory, customizable delimiter, current branch, git status.
  • impstars18 - Based on zork and optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • infolinestars4 - Clean theme that shows git status, background jobs, remote host, and other information.
  • jovialstars127 - Shows host, user, path, development environment, git branch, which python venv is active.
  • kketchamstars0 - Theme with nifty colors on the git info.
  • lambda-gitsterstars75 - Minimalist prompt that includes git information.
  • leafiastars1 - Leafy prezto theme that shows git status information.
  • lewisstars0 - Black, white and red theme. Shows git status information.
  • milightstars0 - Minimal ZSH prompt with git status display, works best with dark terminal backgrounds.
  • nmaxcomstars2 - Minimalist ZSH theme with git status decorations.
  • odinstars73 - Odin is a git-flavored ZSH theme.
  • oxide - A Minimalistic and Dark ZSH theme.
  • plainstars0 - A plain and simple theme for ZSH which shows basic git information.
  • poor-programmerstars0 - Programmer's theme with git status, ruby version and project path.
  • powerline-trainstars4 - A powerline variant.
  • powerzeeshstars0 - A Powerline based ZSH theme. It aims for simplicity, showing information only when it's relevant, optimized for speed and look. Inspired by Agnosterstars3.1k and Powerlinestars1.1k.
  • sepshellstars15 - Clean and minimal ZSH theme based on the old lost taybalt theme, with git bisecting/merging/rebasing modes and configurable prompt symbols.
  • sleeplessmindstars0 - ZSH theme inspired by gitster and odinstars73.
  • theme-linestars10 - Colorful theme with git status.
  • topanstars1 - Includes git information; best on dark backgrounds.
  • tqstars1 - Displays git status, time, requires a Powerline font.
  • ultimatestars10 - Minimalist theme with git indicator, vim mode indicator and shortened path.
  • vananstars0 - Minimalist theme with git information for dark terminals.
  • ysmstars1 - Simple ZSH theme with git status information.
  • zetastars187 - Shows username, git status information, machine name and the current working directory.
  • kentonstars2 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git status information.
  • keloranstars0 - Theme that includes a few features from other themes.

    • Oct 7th, 2018

    Plugins

  • asyncstars540 - Library for running asynchronous tasks in ZSH without requiring any external tools. Allows you to run multiple asynchronous jobs, enforce unique jobs (multiple instances of the same job will not run), flush all currently running jobs and create multiple workers (each with their own jobs).
  • gitsyncstars3 - ZSH plugin to improve workflows for one person developing on the same repository on multiple machines.
  • saneoptstars13 - Sane defaults for ZSH options, in the spirit of vim-sensible.
  • url-highlighterstars27 - A plugin for the ZSH syntax highlighter that turns URLs green if they respond with a "good" status, and red otherwise. Useful for checking URL typos.

    • Completions

  • _url-httplinkstars3 - Extends ZSH's _urls completion, allowing it to complete urls from html pages.

    • Themes

  • cordialstars17 - Clean and effective ZSH theme with git and npm support.
  • rafikistars50 - Adds emojis to your ZSH terminal.

    • Oct 5th, 2018

    Plugins

  • geometry-rust-versionstars1 - Geometrystars778 plugin to display the current folder's Rust version when either a .rs or Cargo.toml is present.

    • Oct 2nd, 2018

    Frameworks

    zshing

  • keep track of and configure your plugins right in the .zshrc
  • Clean unused plugins up
  • run the above actions in a single command
  • manages the Source Plugins of your installed Plugins

    • Sep 29th, 2018

    Themes

  • rufusstars0 - Optimized for dark backgrounds.

    • Sep 27th, 2018

    Themes

  • just-anotherstars0 - Just another theme, with hostname when you're sshed to another machine.
  • riverstars3 - Dark theme with git information.

    • Sep 26th, 2018

    Themes

  • powerline-pillsstars17 - Created in Ruby, uses powerline characters to simulate pills with useful information.

    • Sep 24th, 2018

    Frameworks

    zulu

  • Easily manage your shell environment without editing files.
  • Create aliases, functions and environment variables, and have them available to you at the next shell startup.
  • Add and remove directories from $path, $fpath and $cdpath with simple commands.
  • Install packages, plugins and themes easily, and have them available to you immediately.

    • Sep 22nd, 2018

    Plugins

  • you-should-usestars679 - ZSH plugin that reminds you to use those aliases you defined.

    • Themes

  • krakenstars1 - A dark theme for ZSH.
  • kumavisstars0 - Agnoster fork optimized for solarized terminals. Requires powerline-compatible font.

    • Sep 19th, 2018

    Themes

  • codemonkey-on-firestars0 - Inspired by bashistars5, includes a monkey and git information in your prompt.
  • iamskokstars3 - Works well on a dark background.

    • Sep 18th, 2018

    Themes

  • rougaroustars1 - A dark theme.
  • staplesstars3 - Based on bureau, displays user@host if connected through SSH.

    • Sep 16th, 2018

    Plugins

  • iterm2-colorsstars4 - Manage your iTerm 2's color scheme from the command line.
  • iterm2-tabsstars3 - Set colors and titles of iTerm 2 tabs.
  • iterm-tab-colorsstars39 - Automatically changes iTerm 2 tab color based on the current working directory.

    • Themes

  • prestars42 - A collection of themes for Sublime Text, Terminal, iTerm 2 and ZSH.
  • radiumstars3 - Designed for dark terminals, (works best with Solarizedstars14.8k iTerm 2 theme) (prezto).
  • wild-cherrystars446 - A fairy-tale inspired theme for ZSH, iTerm 2, Sublime, Atom, & Mou.

    • Sep 14th, 2018

    Themes

  • qoomonstars2 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git information. Theme repo includes iTerm 2 and Terminal color settings.

    • Sep 13th, 2018

    Plugins

  • autopairstars230 - A ZSH plugin for auto-closing, deleting and skipping over matching delimiters. Only tested on ZSH 5.0.2 or later.

    • Sep 10th, 2018

    Plugins

  • zsnapacstars1 - Plugin for taking ZFS pre/post upgrade snapshots on Arch Linux.

    • Sep 9th, 2018

    Plugins

  • base16stars1.4k - Adds script to allow you to change your shell's default ANSI colors but most importantly, colors 17 to 21 of your shell's 256 colorspace (if supported by your terminal). This script makes it possible to honor the original bright colors of your shell (e.g. bright green is still green and so on) while providing additional base16 colors to applications such as Vim.

    • Sep 8th, 2018

    Completions

  • jumpstorm-completionstars1 - Adds autocompletion for jumpstormstars44

    • Sep 6th, 2018

    Themes

  • hcompactstars1 - Displays time, OS (including distro if on Linux), directory and whether running as root.
  • hornixstars1 - Displays time & date, OS (including distro if on Linux), directory and whether running as root.

    • Sep 5th, 2018

    Themes

  • adlee - macOS theme, requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • af-magic-mod - af-magic-mod theme.
  • asciigitstars3 - An ASCII-only theme for git users who don't want to use fonts with extra glyphs.
  • ykmam - Modified from ysstars0 theme and optimized for a dark background.
  • z4rr3tstars1 - Based on sindresorhus' purestars10.2k theme.
  • wynwynstars0 - A theme that aims to show you the information you need when you need it. wynwyn takes inspiration from the default theme avit and the excellent Spaceship promptstars14.4k.
  • xxf - Shows the current git commit's shortened hash and message.

    • Sep 1st, 2018

    Plugins

  • visitstars1 - Custom plugin for faster navigation.
  • nstars4 - Auto-switches node versions based on project environment using nstars14.5k.

    • Frameworks

    zplug

  • Can manage everything
    • Zsh plugins/UNIX commands on GitHub and Bitbucket
    • Gist files (gist.github.com)
    • Externally managed plugins e.g., oh-my-zshstars127.5k and preztostars12.1k plugins/themes
    • Binary artifacts on GitHub Releases
    • Local plugins
    • etc. (you can add your own sources!)
  • Super-fast parallel installation/update
  • Support for lazy-loading
  • Branch/tag/commit support
  • Post-update, post-load hooks
  • Dependencies between packages
  • Unlike antigenstars6.5k, no ZSH plugin file (*.plugin.zsh) required
  • Interactive interface (fzfstars36.6k, pecostars6.3k, zawstars498, and so on)
  • Cache mechanism for reducing the startup timestars4.6k

    • Aug 30th, 2018

    Plugins

  • taskbookstars3 - Auto-completes task numbers for taskbook.

    • Aug 29th, 2018

    Plugins

  • ssh-pluginstars2 - Plugin for ssh.
  • depot-toolsstars0 - Simple oh-my-zsh plugin for installing the chromium depot_tools. Installing this plugin will put all of the chromium depot_tools in your path automatically.

  • trafficstars1 - A dark theme for ZSH.

  • gitgostars6 - Open a Github/Gitlab repository in your browser from the command line (macOS only).

    Plugins

  • anyframestars167 - A peco/percol/fzf wrapper plugin for ZSH.
  • cdrstars11 - Easy setup of cdr for ZSH.
  • czhttpdstars49 - A simple http server written in 99.9% pure ZSH.
  • explain-shellstars19 - Opens commands on explainshell.com.
  • hadoop-pluginstars0 - Adds some convenience aliases for hadoop functions.
  • pacistars0 - Plugin for archlinux package managers.
  • virtualenv-modstars1 - A modified virtualenv ZSH plugin for oh-my-zsh.
  • vscstars1 - Plugin for Visual Studio Code on macOS.
  • wdstars567 - Warp directory lets you jump to custom directories in ZSH, without using cd. Why? Because cd seems inefficient when the folder is frequently visited or has a long path.
  • zjumpstars8 - Simplify ZSH directory navigation; jump to already visited, parent or sub folders.

  • aaronstars3 - Based on the Sorin theme.
  • bloxstars57 - A minimal and fast ZSH theme that shows you what you need. It consists of blocks: each block is shown inside a pair of [square brackets], and you can add blocks by simply creating a function.

  • infernusstars0 - Minimalist theme, better on dark backgrounds.

    • Dec 31st, 2017

    Plugins

  • hacker-quotesstars65 - Outputs a hacker quote randomly when you open a terminal.

    • Dec 26th, 2017

    Themes

  • benderstars5 - Fancy two-line prompt with git integration.

    • Dec 24th, 2017

    Completions

  • pass-zsh-completionstars7 - convenience repo to easily obtain pass command completion for ZSH.
  • razor_pluginstars0 - Provides autocomplete for Razorstars18.
  • spring-boot-pluginstars10 - Adds autocompletions for spring-boot commands.

    • Themes

  • dpstars1 - Low contrast theme that shows current git branch, if the repository is dirty and the value of $PYENV_VERSION.
  • agnoster-modstars3 - Agnoster variant with a right-prompt.
  • agnoster-refreshstars4 - Agnoster variant, includes battery and online status.
  • moonlinestars13 - Minimal but easily extensible prompt.
  • nothingstars25 - Lightning fast and really simple because it has almost nothing in it.

    • Dec 22nd, 2017

    Tutorials

    Generic ZSH

  • Why ZSH is Cooler than your Shell - slideshare presentation.

    • Dec 9th, 2017

    Plugins

  • tailfstars1 - Adds tailf function with prefixed newlines instead of trailing newlines.

    • Dec 4th, 2017

    Plugins

  • change-casestars6 - Plugin for fast swap between upper and lower case in your command line. 😎

    • Nov 28th, 2017

    Plugins

  • dune-quotesstars3 - Random Dune quote generator plugin.

    • Nov 26th, 2017

    Themes

  • fattyarrowstars0 - Minimal ZSH prompt that works better on dark backgrounds.

    • Nov 25th, 2017

    Plugins

  • java-zsh-pluginstars1 - Adds a setjdk command so you can switch easily between different versions of the jdk.
  • completion-generatorstars174 - This plugin tries to read the list of options from the help text of programs and generate a completion function automatically. Note that this doesn't do it automatically, you have to explicitly call the generator to create a completion script.
  • watson.zshstars2 - A plugin for the watsonstars1.8k time management system.

    • Nov 22nd, 2017

    Themes

  • karustars2 - Minimalist single line ZSH prompt.

    • Nov 19th, 2017

    Themes

  • llamastars6 - Minimalist theme used by discerning llamas.

    • Nov 12th, 2017

    Themes

  • guristars17 - A Simple and fast Oh-My-Zsh theme, based on Purestars10.2k's design.

    • Nov 6th, 2017

    Themes

  • remolueoendstars0 - Prezto ZSH theme based on Sorin, using emojis for tracking GIT context.

    • Nov 4th, 2017

    Themes

  • sugar-freestars3 - Based on the Purestars10.2k and Candy themes.

    • Oct 28th, 2017

    Plugins

  • autosuggestionsstars17.2k - Fish-like fast/unobtrusive autosuggestions for ZSH.
  • basexstars2 - Adds several BaseX aliases for simplified usage.
  • bdstars339 - Jump back to a specific directory, without doing cd ../../...
  • cmd-architectstars81 - Build commands from what's in history and at prompt, move, delete, add command segments and search history with multi-word queries.
  • dircyclestars17 - Cycle through the directory stack.
  • editing-workbenchstars39 - Adds sane, complex command line editing (e.g. incremental history word completion).
  • emojisstars9 - Adds numerous ascii art emojis to your environment in convenient variables.
  • favorite-directoriesstars7 - Fast jumps to your favorite directories.
  • functionalstars119 - ZSH higher order functions.
  • fuzzy-search-and-editstars26 - ZSH plugin for fuzzy searching files and instantly opening a matched file on matched line.
  • hintsstars47 - Display glob and parameter flags and other non completable info right under your editing buffer.
  • historystars79 - Extend history so that it can be queried by SQL.
  • interactive-cdstars226 - Fish-like interactive tab completion for cd.
  • iterm-touchbarstars641 - Display iTerm2 feedback in the MacbookPro TouchBar (Current directory, git branch & status).
  • konsole-theme-changerstars1 - Toggle konsole theme from ZSH.
  • manydots-magicstars36 - A zle tweak for emulating ...'==../..' etc.
  • maven-pluginstars0 - A fork of the oh-my-zsh maven plugin.
  • mercurialstars3 - Extracted from oh-my-zsh so you can use it without oh-my-zsh.
  • morphostars20 - Terminal screen savers written in pure ZSH, and also screen saver framework.
  • navigation-toolsstars257 - Adds htop-like kill, directory bookmarks browser, multi-word incremental history searcher and more.
  • open-prstars63 - A ZSH plugin to open pull requests from command line.
  • opt-pathstars9 - Automatically add ~/opt subpaths to your $PATH.
  • osxstars14 - Add some common macOS related aliases and functions.
  • plugin-railsstars2 - ZSH plugin for Rails.
  • plugin-vscodestars16 - Plugin for Visual Studio Code, a text editor for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
  • reentry-hookstars5 - Plugin that re-enters working directory if it has been removed and re-created.
  • selectstars11 - Multi-term searched selection list with approximate matching and uniq mode.
  • suffix-aliasstars1 - Directly open files in the shell using ZSH's suffix aliases.
  • syntax-highlighting-filetypesstars132 - ZSH syntax highlighting with dircolors in realtime.
  • syntax-highlightingstars11.8k - Add syntax highlighting to your ZSH. Make sure you load this before zsh-users/zsh-history-substring-search or they will both break.
  • t32stars2 - Plugin for the Lauterbach Trace32 toolset. It automatically registers fonts and sets all necessary environment variables to run the t32 toolset.
  • travisstars4 - Opens the Travis CI page for the current repo if one exists.

    • Oct 22nd, 2017

    Plugins

  • escape-backtickstars1 - Quickly insert escaped backticks when double-tapping "`".

    • Oct 15th, 2017

    Plugins

  • gpg-agentstars10 - Plugin that tries to do the right thing when it comes to setting up the GPG agent to act as an SSH agent as well on macOS.
  • noreallyjustfuckingstopalreadystars288 - macOS users know the pain of trying to figure out what command actually flushes the DNS cache on their version of macOS, and this plugin makes that annoyance go away.
  • tumultstars107 - Adds tools for macOS.

    • Themes

  • nextbikestars4 - A very basic theme which just features an macOS bike icon.
  • aterminalstars30 - Displays Nodejs, NPM, Docker, Go, Python, Elixir and Ruby information in the prompt.

    • Sep 30th, 2017

    Plugins

  • cd-sshstars0 - ssh to a server when you accidentally cd to it.

    • Sep 29th, 2017

    Plugins

  • randemestars4 - Chooses a random theme for each session. If you not like the chosen theme you can run randeme_rm to never show that theme again.

    • Sep 28th, 2017

    Plugins

  • vim-pluginstars17 - Allows you to do vim filename:123 to open a file with the cursor at a specific line.

    • Sep 24th, 2017

    Plugins

  • dirstackstars1 - Plugin for displaying dirstack info on a single line.
  • dogeshstars5 - Dogification plugin.
  • reminderstars28 - A plugin which displays reminders above every prompt.
  • sublimestars3 - Same as the official Sublime plugin for Oh My Zsh, but this opens files in the current Sublime window, if there is one already open.

    • Completions

  • novastars7 - Provides auto-complete for nova.

    • Sep 15th, 2017

  • diractionsstars28 - Allow you to map a short logical/mnemonic name to directories to quickly access them, or perform actions in them.

    • Aug 14th, 2017

  • drush_zsh_completionstars39 - Drush autocomplete awesomeness for ZSH.
  • duellstars2 - A ZSH plugin for duellstars40.

    • Themes

  • cloudystars28 - Minimal cloudy ZSH theme.
  • cmderstars10 - A ZSH theme that matches the theme of Cmder, a popular terminal emulator for windows.
  • excessstars4 - Simple ZSH color theme.
  • horse-shstars0 - A very minimal brown/red ZSH theme.
  • lambda-purestars101 - A minimal ZSH theme, based on Pure, with added NodeJS version.
  • maustars2 - A ZSH theme with a cat twist.
  • misastars1 - Misalabs' ZSH theme.
  • muslimstars6 - A simple minimal ZSH prompt theme.
  • oh-my-gitstars3.4k - An opinionated prompt for bash and ZSH.
  • skeletor-syntaxstars17 - Theme collection for Atom, Prism and ZSH inspired by Skeletor from He-Man and the Masters of the Universe.
  • statuslinestars59 - A responsive ZSH theme that provides informational segments when you need them.

    • Installation

    dotzsh

  • Open a new ZSH terminal window or tab

  • bumblebeestars1 - A plugin to toggle optirun in the command line.

  • ubuntualiasesstars2 - Ubuntu 16 aliases.
  • zcestars57 - Vim’s EasyMotion / Emacs’s ace-jump-mode for ZSH.
  • zgdbmstars3 - Adds GDBM as a plugin.
  • zinfo_linestars1 - Makes more information available to ZSH themes.
  • zsnapshotstars8 - Adds command to dump the current ZSH state into a file, for later restoration by sourcing the snapshot file.

    Themes

  • bruntystars4 - Brunty theme.
  • dissonancestars4 - Comes with custom LSCOLORS and LS_COLORS settings files, works with both dark and light terminal themes.
  • dmxstars1 - Optimized for dark terminal windows.
  • garrettstars150 - Prezto prompt with the information you need the moment you need it.
  • hub - Simple and clean, includes the return code of the last command executed.
  • kimwzstars9 - Minimal theme.
  • lazyprodigystars1 - Optimized for dark terminals, has variants for local and remote systems.
  • magicostars0 - IOsonoTAN's magico theme.
  • minstars10 - A minimalistic ZSH prompt.
  • oh-my-viastars28 - Theme for ZSH which mainly forks the historical theme used on VIA servers.
  • ozonostars6 🌏 OZ0NO - Let's Breathe a clean ZSH.
  • ponchostars3 - RDM's basic oh-my-zsh custom theme.
  • powerlessstars62 - Tiny & simple pure ZSH prompt inspired by powerline.
  • prezto-lambdastars0 - Lambda theme (for prezto).
  • trajanstars1 - A dark theme for ZSH.
  • xremixstars1 - An oh-my-zsh shell theme based on the Jreese theme plugin.

  • keybasestars18 - Completions for keybase.

    Plugins

  • ansiweatherstars1.6k - Weather in your terminal, with ANSI colors and Unicode symbols.
  • asciidoctorstars3 - A plugin for AsciiDoctor.
  • bitbucket-git-helpersstars17 - Adds helper scripts to allow you to create bitbucket PRs or open a directory in the current branch.
  • crashstars42 - Adds proper error handling, exceptions and try/catch for ZSH.
  • emoji-clistars360 - 😱 Emoji completion on the command line.
  • expand-ealiasstars12 - Expand specific aliases with space.
  • get-jquerystars1 - Plugin for fast downloading jQuery library from code.jquery.com.
  • host-switchstars4 - Make it easier to switch in different /etc/hosts files during development.
  • laravelstars12 - Add shortcuts for Laravel 5, 5.1, 5.2 & 5.3.
  • listboxstars38 - Listbox element for shell.
  • monorepo-pluginstars3 - ZSH plugin for monorepo management.
  • nvm-autostars63 - Aims to alleviate needing to type nvm use as much as possible, especially if you often switch between versions of node.js and use .nvmrc files in your project to manage what version of node your project needs.
  • open-create-projectsstars3 - Open/Create projects in Jetbrains.
  • pctlstars7 - Toggle the environment variables for proxying.
  • revolverstars114 - A progress spinner for ZSH scripts.
  • setenvstars5 - Runs a script when you change directories.
  • startup-timerstars16 - Print the time it takes for the shell to start up.
  • statifystars2 - Plugin that does basic statistical analysis.
  • warholstars46 - Configures colorization with grcstars1.2k.

  • docker-composestars41 Show docker container status in your prompt.

  • zshmarksstars219 - A port of Bashmarks (by Todd Werth), a simple command line bookmarking plugin, for oh-my-zsh.

  • autopkg-zsh-completionstars9 - Completions for autopkg.
  • bosh-zsh-autocompletionstars2 - Adds BOSH autocompletion.

  • cabalstars0 - Adds autocompletion for cabal.
  • dbicstars0 - Automatically sets up Environment variables for DBIx::Class::Migration's script and Dancer.

    Themes

  • platypusstars1 - Platypus is a simple and convenient theme for oh-my-zsh used by Frédéric de Villamil.

    • Mar 9th, 2016

    Themes

  • darkblood-modularstars1 - This version of the popular darkblood theme has been enhanced with a near complete rewrite enabling modularity and a few new features.
  • bluelinesstars2 - Clear and blue theme.
  • cobalt2stars1.1k - Wes Bos' Cobalt 2 theme for ZSH and iTerm 2.
  • codemachinestars6 - Codemachine theme.
  • frlostars1 - Uses your computer's hostname to come up with a (hopefully) unique three-color theme to display in your prompt, so you know at a glance which machine you're logged into.
  • itgstars34 - itsthatguy's theme.
  • judgedimstars0 - Minimalist prompt.
  • klendathustars0 - Uses Powerline iconsolas.
  • megapromptstars4 - A maximalist prompt including keyboard mode, ownership info, and other contextual info, with λ as the prompt character. Requires the hooksstars35 plugin.
  • mindful-spacestars2 - ZSH theme with space in mind.
  • nanofishstars3 - Adds fish-style directory prompt to nanotech theme.
  • ningxiastars0 - Based on af-magic.
  • padstars5 - A concise and colorful oh-my-zsh theme.
  • prezto-cloud-promptstars1 - Prezto port of oh-my-zsh's cloud prompt.
  • prezto_powerlinestars118 - Powerline for prezto. Shows git information, RVM version.
  • racotecnicstars10 - Based on af-magic and posh-git.
  • seekerstars46 - This theme uses many special unicode characters to be fancy, but it may cause some problems without well supported fonts.
  • smileystars6 - A prompt with happy and sad faces.
  • zshcomradestars7 - A ZSH theme, comrade!

    • Fonts

  • Awesome Terminal Fontsstars2.2k - A family of fonts that includes some nice monospaced Icons.
  • Fantasque Awesome Fontstars30 - A nice monospaced font, patched with Font-Awesome, Octoicons and Powerline-Glyphs.
  • Powerline patched font collectionstars21.6k - A collection of a dozen or so fonts patched to include powerline gylphs.

    • Other Resources

    ZSH Tools

  • zshdbstars214 - A ZSH debugger

    • Completions

  • racket completionstars3 - Completion for Racket.

    • Plugins

  • alias-tipsstars485 - An oh-my-zsh plugin to help remembering those aliases you defined once.
  • auto-fu.zshstars409 - Automatic complete-word and list-choices. Originally incr-0.2.zsh by y.fujii .
  • browse-commitstars15 - A plugin that lets you open any commit in your browser from the command line.
  • cdbkstars13 - A ZSH plugin to allow easy named directory creation - shortcuts to any directory you want.
  • gitfaststars6 - Updated fork of oh-my-zsh gitfast plugin.
  • hipchatstars13 - Send hipchat messages from the shell.
  • hooksstars35 - Add missing hooks - for plugins and personal use.
  • mfuncstars7 - Allows you to define persistent functions on-the-fly, without the need to add them to your config files. These functions are permanently available until you delete them.
  • nice-exit-codestars31 - Maps exit status code to human readable string.
  • smart-cdstars15 - Runs ls and git status after chpwd.
  • snippetsstars29 - Command line snippet expansion.
  • sysadmin-utilstars770 - Steve Kemp's collection of tool scripts for sysadmins.
  • zerostars15 - Zero is both a plugin and a theme. See the github page for installation details.

  • Add the repo to your plugin list

  • Migrate from Oh-My-Zsh to Prezto - Jerome Dalbert's blog post on migrating to Prezto.

    • Apr 8th, 2015

    Fonts

  • Input Mono - A family of fonts designed specifically for code. It offers both monospaced and proportional fonts and includes powerline glyphs.

    • Jan 13th, 2015

    Installation

    dotzsh

  • Clone new plugins into .zsh.local/modules

    • Dec 31st, 2014

    Tutorials

    Generic ZSH

  • Outrageously Useful Tips To Master Your Z Shell covers some of the features that ZSH has that Bash doesn't, and using oh-my-zsh.

    • Oct 7th, 2014

    Installation

    dotzsh

  • Load the plugin module in .zshrc

    • Installation

    Oh-My-Zsh

  • cd ~/.oh-my-zsh/custom/plugins
  • git clone repo

    • Installation

    Prezto

  • Clone the plugin into your prezto modules directory
  • Add the plugin to your .zpreztorc file
  • Open a new terminal window or tab
